events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the tire wear signature is a composite diagnostic cue — inner-edge wear points to camber/toe out of OEM alignment spec, while cupping points to worn/failing dampers (struts/shocks). Since suspension work is only rough-complete (not yet aligned/verified against OEM spec), I marked it `fail` at `medium` risk, listing corrective actions (alignment check vs. OEM spec, damper inspection/replacement, road test, documentation) before sign-off.
